rows.name: X-Mid 1 Groundsheet
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS WEIGHT X-Mid 1 Groundsheet 3.7 oz / 105 g. MATERIALS Fabric 20D Sil/PE polyester in Grey. (Shared groundsheet spec table; 'Works with post-2024 X-Mid 1 and X-Mid 1 Solid only.')

rows.name: X-Mid 2 Groundsheet
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS WEIGHT X-Mid 2 Groundsheet 5.1 oz / 146 g. ('Works with the X-Mid 2, X-Mid 2 Solid (all years), and X-Mid Pro 2+'.)

rows.name: X-Mid Pro 1 Groundsheet
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS WEIGHT X-Mid Pro 1 Groundsheet 3.3 oz / 95 g. ('Works with the X-Mid Pro 1 (all years). Also works with the 2019-2024 X-Mid 1 and X-Mid 1 Solid.')

rows.name: X-Mid Pro 2 Groundsheet
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS WEIGHT X-Mid Pro 2 Groundsheet 4.8 oz / 135 g. ('Works with the X-Mid Pro 2 only (all years).')

rows.name: X-Mid Pro 2+ Groundsheet
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS WEIGHT X-Mid Pro 2+ Groundsheet 5.1 oz / 146 g. ('Same groundsheet as X-Mid 2 (listed separately for clarity). Works with the X-Mid Pro 2+ (all years), X-Mid 2, and X-Mid 2 Solid'.)

rows.name: X-Dome 1+ Groundsheet
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS WEIGHT X-Dome 1+ Groundsheet 3.7 oz / 105 g. ('Fits X-Dome 1+ only.')

rows.name: X-Dome 2 Groundsheet
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS WEIGHT X-Dome 2 Groundsheet 5.1 oz / 145 g. ('Fits X-Dome 2 only.')

rows.name: X-Mid 1 Solid
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS WEIGHT Fly 18.7 oz / 530 g - Inner Tent 12.7 oz / 360 g - Complete Tent 31.4 oz / 890 g - Stuff Sack 0.4 oz / 12 g. (Solid-inner version of the X-Mid 1; 20D Sil/PE polyester canopy and floor, 15D ripstop nylon inner.)

rows.name: X-Mid 2 Solid
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS WEIGHT Fly 21.8 oz / 620 g - Inner Tent 15.7 oz / 445 g - Complete Tent 37.5 oz / 1065 g - Stuff Sack 0.5 oz / 15 g.

rows.name: X-Mid Pro 1
rows.quote: WEIGHT Tent 15.5 oz / 440 g (Dyneema® floor) or 17.1 oz / 485 g (Silnylon floor). (Floor is a purchase option: 'Dyneema' or 'Woven'; the canopy is Dyneema Composite Fabric either way.)

rows.name: X-Mid Pro 2
rows.quote: WEIGHT Tent 17.9 oz / 509 g (Dyneema® floor) or 19.9 oz / 565 g (Silnylon floor).

rows.name: X-Mid Pro 2+
rows.quote: WEIGHT Tent 19.2 oz / 545 g (Dyneema® floor) or 21.5 oz / 610 g (Silnylon floor) - Stuff Sack 0.3oz / 8g (Dyneema®).

rows.name: X-Mid Pro 2+
rows.quote: WEIGHT Tent 19.2 oz / 545 g (Dyneema® floor) or 21.5 oz / 610 g (Silnylon floor).

rows.name: X-Dome 1+
rows.quote: Fly 14.3 oz / 405 g + Inner Tent 11.1 oz / 315 g (Regular) + Pole Set 11.1 oz / 310 g (Carbon Short) = 1030 g. Durston publishes one complete figure — 'Complete Tent 34.7 oz / 985 g (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' — which equals 405 + 315 + 265, confirming the component sum for the other pole/inner configs.

rows.name: X-Dome 1+
rows.quote: Fly 14.3 oz / 405 g + Inner Tent 11.1 oz / 315 g (Regular) + Pole Set 13.0 oz / 365 g (Aluminum) = 1085 g. Sum method confirmed by Durston's own 'Complete Tent 34.7 oz / 985 g (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' = 405 + 315 + 265.

rows.name: X-Dome 1+
rows.quote: Fly 14.3 oz / 405 g + Inner Tent 12.9 oz / 365 g (Solid) + Pole Set 9.3 oz / 265 g (Carbon) = 1035 g. Sum method confirmed by Durston's own 'Complete Tent 34.7 oz / 985 g (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' = 405 + 315 + 265.

rows.name: X-Dome 1+
rows.quote: Fly 14.3 oz / 405 g + Inner Tent 12.9 oz / 365 g (Solid) + Pole Set 11.1 oz / 310 g (Carbon Short) = 1080 g. Sum method confirmed by Durston's own 'Complete Tent 34.7 oz / 985 g (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' = 405 + 315 + 265.

rows.name: X-Dome 1+
rows.quote: Fly 14.3 oz / 405 g + Inner Tent 12.9 oz / 365 g (Solid) + Pole Set 13.0 oz / 365 g (Aluminum) = 1135 g. Sum method confirmed by Durston's own 'Complete Tent 34.7 oz / 985 g (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' = 405 + 315 + 265.

rows.name: X-Dome 2
rows.quote: Fly 18.0 oz / 510 g + Inner Tent 14.6 oz / 415 g (Regular) + Pole Set 12.9 oz / 365 g (Carbon Short) = 1290 g. Durston publishes one complete figure — 'Complete Tent 44 oz / 1.26 kg (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' — which equals 510 + 415 + 330, confirming the component sum for the other pole/inner configs.

rows.name: X-Dome 2
rows.quote: Fly 18.0 oz / 510 g + Inner Tent 14.6 oz / 415 g (Regular) + Pole Set 17.8 oz / 505 g (Aluminum) = 1430 g. Sum method confirmed by Durston's own 'Complete Tent 44 oz / 1.26 kg (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' = 510 + 415 + 330.

rows.name: X-Dome 2
rows.quote: Fly 18.0 oz / 510 g + Inner Tent 18.3 oz / 520 g (Solid) + Pole Set 11.6 oz / 330 g (Carbon) = 1360 g. Sum method confirmed by Durston's own 'Complete Tent 44 oz / 1.26 kg (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' = 510 + 415 + 330.

rows.name: X-Dome 2
rows.quote: Fly 18.0 oz / 510 g + Inner Tent 18.3 oz / 520 g (Solid) + Pole Set 12.9 oz / 365 g (Carbon Short) = 1395 g. Sum method confirmed by Durston's own 'Complete Tent 44 oz / 1.26 kg (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' = 510 + 415 + 330.

rows.name: X-Dome 2
rows.quote: Fly 18.0 oz / 510 g + Inner Tent 18.3 oz / 520 g (Solid) + Pole Set 17.8 oz / 505 g (Aluminum) = 1535 g. Sum method confirmed by Durston's own 'Complete Tent 44 oz / 1.26 kg (Regular interior + Carbon poles)' = 510 + 415 + 330.

rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS Weight 88 g (3.1 oz) per pole Packed Length 12.25" (31 cm) Adjustment Range 43.5 - 51.5" (111 - 131 cm).

rows.quote: 'Weight 88 g (3.1 oz) per pole' — sold singly or as a pair, so a pair is 176 g / 6.2 oz.

rows.name: X-Mid Stargazer Kit
rows.quote: WEIGHT Connectors: 0.25 oz (7 g) x 2 - Guylines: 0.15 oz (5 g) x 2 - Complete Kit 0.8 oz (24 g). COMPATABILITY All 2025 X-Mid tents except Pro series.

rows.name: J Stake
rows.quote: 'Stake packs include the stake sack and a total of 8 DAC stakes. The 8 DAC stakes are provided in two sizes (6" and 8") with 4 of each length. These stakes weigh 7g and 16g respectively.' (The stakes Durston ships with the X-Mid and X-Dome tents.)

rows.name: J Stake
rows.quote: 'The 8 DAC stakes are provided in two sizes (6" and 8") with 4 of each length. These stakes weigh 7g and 16g respectively.'

rows.name: Reflective Ironwire (50' Hank)
rows.quote: SPECIFICATIONS Weight 2.1 oz (60 g) Length 50' (15 m) Diameter 2.0 mm. 'our Reflective Ironwire 2.0 mm cord uses Dyneema® fibers in both the core and sheath'. (Lawson-made cord sold by Durston; spec from the Durston listing.)
